headline: A Look At Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: How Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) stock has been moving Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) has caught investor attention after a period of mixed share performance, with the stock down over the past month and past 3 months despite positive annual revenue and net income growth. See our latest analysis for Cognizant Technology Solutions.
